forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Becoming cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly before dawn then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:40am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of light showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a light shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of light showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Sunny. Patchy morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.
Sunny. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
